# external-docs/

Drop zone for raw external reference material: datasheets, vendor documentation, board wikis, application notes, and similar source files.

**Do not edit files in this folder.** They are read-only source material.

When a file is added here, analyse it and create or update the corresponding file in `../knowledge/` with the extracted configuration and pin data. Mark any unconfirmed values clearly so they can be validated experimentally.
